推荐场景: 客服柜台｜说明服务问题
60秒任务: 「说明问题」：投诉/政策/要求/方案；A=听懂潜台词并稳住关系；B=误判立场/过度直接翻车。
目标功能: 投诉｜政策｜责任｜要求｜补偿｜解决方案评估
场景族: 诊所前台｜银行/服务窗口｜邮局｜维修柜台｜咨询室
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
I’m calling about a problem with ___.（说明来意）
Something seems to be wrong with ___.（说明问题）
The issue started on ___.（说明时间）
I was told that ___, but ___.（对比承诺与现实）
Could you check my account, please?（请求查询）
I have the receipt here.（提供凭证）
The problem is affecting ___.（说明影响）
I’ve already tried ___.（说明已尝试）
Can you explain what happened?（请求解释）
I’m not sure who is responsible.（责任不清）
This has caused some inconvenience.（说明不便）
What are my options?（询问选项）
Could you look into this today?（请求当天处理）
I’d like to understand the next step.（确认下一步）
Thank you for checking.（礼貌收尾）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: problem, account, receipt, appointment, package, device, service, inconvenience
Verbs: check, explain, fix, look into, try, affect, report, update
Adjectives / Status: wrong, delayed, missing, damaged, confusing, urgent
Time / Place: today, yesterday, last week, at the front desk, at the service counter
Chunks: calling about, something wrong, caused inconvenience, look into this, next step
